texto: You can’t find God through astronomy
autor: you can’t find immortality through biology. The Kingdom of Heaven can’t be attained through philosophy. There is only one way that leads to these things and that way is through the spirit.
explicacao: Citação de you can’t find immortality through biology. The Kingdom of Heaven can’t be attained through philosophy. There is only one way that leads to these things and that way is through the spirit. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “You can’t find God through astronomy” articula reflexao, michelle-carbotte, through em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
